productDisplayName: Rockport Men's Trinchero Drak Brown Shoe
description: Talk about walking comfort in dress shoes, and there's no better brand that can offer it than rockport. If you want to experience this, then slip your feet into the Trinchero oxfords. Replete with a smooth, flawless upper, traditional lacing system and a plain toe silhouette, it's a great addition to any sophisticated man's wardrobe. With a stacked heel, dynamic suspension footbed and a heavily padded insole, the Trinchero is a perfect footwear for those long hours at work.Upper Smooth full grain leather upper for a classic look and durability Leather overlays on the sides and heel for added support to the midfoot and back foot Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Rounded, plain toe silhouette for comfortable use Mildly padded collar and tongue for snug comfort Midsole Man-made PU midsole for lightweight comfort Heavily padded footbed with Dynamic Suspension technology that creates a thin air cushion under the foot, moving according to the pressure of your foot from heel to toe, ensuring maximum comfort even with the slightest movement Outsole Durable PU outsole with textured wide lugs in the forefoot and back heel for maximum grip and traction even on smooth surface Flex grooves in the forefoot and heel for easy movement Raised heel for added style and comfort shoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner and leather brush to restore shineDo not store in direct sunlight
